codeReview.summary: All 5 contract files have comprehensive JSDoc comments for all exported Zod schemas. The comments accurately describe the purpose of each schema and include helpful context about usage (which endpoints use the schema, what data shape is expected). The implementation fully satisfies all validation contract assertions (VAL-CONST-024 through VAL-CONST-028).

summary: PASS: The contracts-jsdoc feature successfully adds JSDoc documentation to all 29 exported Zod schemas across the 5 shared/contracts/*.ts files. Each JSDoc block clearly describes the schema's purpose, and many include additional context about endpoint usage and data shape. The worker followed the backend-worker skill procedure correctly, ran all verification commands (tsc, biome, grep count), and produced a clean commit with 128 lines of documentation additions. All validation contract assertions (VAL-CONST-024 through VAL-CONST-028) are satisfied.
